input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.4.1
            TITLE: inertia switch requirement

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.4.1: Inertia Switch Requirement
T.9.4.1 Inertia Switch Requirement  
• (EV) Must have an Inertia Switch 
• (IC) Should have an Inertia Switch

final_answer: rule T.9.4.1: Inertia Switch Requirement T.9.4.1 Inertia Switch Requirement • (EV) Must have an Inertia Switch • (IC) Should have an Inertia Switch
